response_queue.incident_title: North Korea-Nexus Threat Actor Compromises Widely Used Axios NPM Package in Supply Chain Attack
response_steps: Roll back to last known-good state
response_queue.mitigation: Apply emergency patch or vendor-supplied hotfix immediately. Deploy WAF rule / virtual patch if patch unavailable. Enable MFA on all privileged accounts. Rotate credentials for exposed services. Segment network to limit blast radius.
